description: Daily mini-apps built by Ada for Amber

apps.title: Speed Sketch Battle
apps.oneLiner: Instant-play drawing game — 30-second sketches, pass the phone, vote for the best. Zero onboarding, pure party game energy.

apps.title: Sponsor Pitch Calculator
apps.oneLiner: Calculate what to charge for sponsored Substack posts based on subscriber count, engagement rate, niche positioning, and content format — know your worth before the pitch.

apps.title: AI Safety Inspector
apps.oneLiner: Paste any AI-generated text and get instant analysis of hallucination markers, confidence signals, hedging patterns, and potential fabrications — learn to read AI output critically.

apps.title: Level One
apps.oneLiner: Zero-onboarding physics puzzle — redirect flowing particles into targets by placing blockers. Instant play, no menus, pure mechanics.

apps.title: Crowd Wisdom
apps.oneLiner: Fast-paced number guessing — tap the closer answer before you run out of lives. Streaks give bonus points!

apps.title: Palette Studio
apps.oneLiner: Mix paint colors like a real artist — slide red, yellow, blue, white, and black to create custom colors, see instant RGB/hex values, and save your favorite palettes.

apps.title: Brain Dump → Action
apps.oneLiner: Convert messy thoughts into sorted next-actions fast — type everything on your mind, then auto-sort into do-now, do-later, delegate, or drop.

apps.title: OUTRUN ME — Amber's SL
apps.oneLiner: A full pseudo-3D arcade racer on a 2D canvas — drive the red 380SL convertible (pup riding shotgun) down the Cape Cod coast and through Boston, beating the clock at every checkpoint. Vanilla JS, zero assets, mobile-ready.

apps.title: Product Launch Checklist
apps.oneLiner: Track everything you need to launch a new product — photos, pricing, listings, marketing — with a reusable checklist that saves progress and celebrates when you ship.

apps.title: Agent Handoff Simulator
apps.oneLiner: Visualize how multi-agent systems route and delegate work — type a task, watch it decompose into subtasks routed to specialized agents with context handoffs.

apps.title: Reading Backlog
apps.oneLiner: Track articles, papers, and links you want to reference later with notes on why they matter and tags to find them fast.

apps.title: Story Starter Dice
apps.oneLiner: Roll the dice to generate creative story prompts — pick your character, setting, object, conflict, and twist with playful dice that shuffle on every tap.

apps.title: Outreach Tracker
apps.oneLiner: Track who you've reached out to, when, and why — log pitches, partnerships, and collaborations with smart follow-up reminders so nothing falls through the cracks.

apps.title: Wholesale Calculator
apps.oneLiner: Price your creative work for wholesale and gallery channels — calculate what to charge retailers and galleries so you still make money after their cut.

apps.title: AI Reasoning Inspector
apps.oneLiner: Paste any AI response and get an instant breakdown of its reasoning patterns, confidence signals, logical structure, and potential biases — learn to read AI output critically.

apps.title: Dreamhouse FM
apps.oneLiner: Design spaces for how they make people feel, not just how they look — adjust lighting, materials, and layout, then get AI emotional analysis for healing environments.

apps.title: Weekly Review Template
apps.oneLiner: A structured weekly review ritual — reflect on wins, learnings, and what's next with a mobile-first checklist that saves your progress locally.

apps.title: Creative Product Pricer
apps.oneLiner: Price your creative work with confidence across originals, prints, licensing, and workshops — calculate value-based rates using materials, time, experience, and market positioning.

apps.title: Context Window Visualizer
apps.oneLiner: Paste any text and see how many tokens it uses across GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini — understand context limits visually and plan your prompts smarter.

apps.title: Dinner Decision Spinner
apps.oneLiner: A playful spinning wheel to pick what's for dinner when the family can't decide — add options, tap to spin, get dramatic results with sound and flair.

apps.title: Decision Log
apps.oneLiner: Track key decisions with context, reasoning, and outcomes — see patterns over time and build your decision-making muscle.

apps.title: Workshop Pricing Calculator
apps.oneLiner: Price your workshops with confidence — calculate break-even, competitive, and premium tiers based on your time, materials, and desired income.

apps.title: How AI Actually Works
apps.oneLiner: A 30-minute interactive class for middle schoolers — fill-in-the-blank game, jargon-busting vocab, AI lie detector, and a real LLM running in the browser.

apps.title: Portfolio Builder
apps.oneLiner: Shared CMS for Amber Miro's portfolio system — 12 pieces, 9 documents, 19 tasks, all sync'd via Telegram.

apps.title: Family Jeopardy!
apps.oneLiner: Mobile Jeopardy board for the family — 47 categories, 705 questions, fresh 5×5 board every round.

apps.title: Prompt Sharpener
apps.oneLiner: Paste any AI prompt and get instant critique + rewrite — learn what makes prompts sharp vs sloppy, with before/after examples.

apps.title: Magic Decision Maker
apps.oneLiner: Mystical toy for trivial decisions — ask a question, shake your phone, get delightfully dramatic guidance with personality.

apps.title: Revenue Pulse
apps.oneLiner: Visual progress meter toward your $25K/year Amber Miro Creative goal — set monthly targets, log earnings, watch the bar grow.

apps.title: OutRun '86
apps.oneLiner: Pseudo-3D arcade driving game inspired by the 1986 classic — cruise the beach highway in your red Mercedes 380SL, hit checkpoints for bonus time, and race against the clock with mobile-optimized touch controls.
